arts.ttl: Real Madrid Not Considered Threat to Liverpool, Man City for €20M-Per-Year PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been keeping a close eye on Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months, with a transfer nearly materializing last summer. At the same time, Barcelona are reportedly targeting Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah along with Kimmich as they look to strengthen both their midfield and defense ahead of the 2025 season. arts.ttl: US national team veteran Crystal Dunn joins Paris Saint-Germain
arts.sum: She played one season with the club, appearing in 23 matches with one goal and two assists. A New York native, Dunn played on the U.S team that won the gold medal at the Paris Olympics last summer.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, PSG Hold ‘Positive’ Talks Over €25M-Rated Talent Amid Newcastle, Wolves Links
arts.sum: With the January transfer window now open, Paris Saint-Germain is looking to move on players who no longer fit into their plans—Marco Asensio being one of them. Since November 30, Asensio’s role has been steadily reduced. The former Real Madrid star has dropped out of the starting lineup and has rarely made appearances off the […] The post Aston Villa, PSG Hold ‘Positive’ Talks Over €25M-Rated Talent Amid Newcastle, Wolves Links appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Revisit €65M-Rated PSG Target After Shifting Focus From Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s decision to part ways with Randal Kolo Muani has opened the door for the club to find a new No. 9 to team up with Gonçalo Ramos in attack, either in January or next summer. Kolo Muani, who has played just 453 minutes this season—mostly as a substitute—has now joined Juventus on loan. arts.ttl: PSG Poised to Pursue €30M-Rated Chelsea, Man Utd Target This Summer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are facing uncertainty over their goalkeeping situation, with Gianluigi Donnarumma’s future still up in the air. If the club decides to part ways with the 25-year-old, they’ll need to find a replacement in the transfer market. arts.ttl: Aston Villa remain in ‘positive’ talks to sign PSG’s Marco Asensio
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Paris Saint-Germain are locked in positive talks over the transfer of Spain international Marco Asensio (29), according to a report from L’Équipe. As reported at the start of…

arts.ttl: PSG pursuing summer move for Lille’s Lucas Chevalier
arts.sum: PSG will pursue a summer move for Lille goalkeeper Lucas Chevalier (23), L’Equipe can reveal this Friday. Les Parisiens have reportedly already informed all the involved parties that the France…

arts.ttl: USWNT's Crystal Dunn joins PSG after Gotham departure
arts.sum: United States women's national team defender Crystal Dunn has joined Paris Saint-Germain on a free transfer, the club has announced . "I'm very happy to be joining Paris Saint-Germain, an ambitious club with an incredible city," Dunn said in a statement.

arts.ttl: FULL DRAW | PSG draw Brest, Monaco to face Benfica in Champions League
